_comment: Lokal ML model registry. SHA-256 values are PLACEHOLDERS — verify against HuggingFace before shipping. Gemma models require accepting Google's terms at huggingface.co/google/gemma-4-e2b-it.

gemma4-e2b.description: Gemma 4 E2B (2.3B active / 5.1B total with embeddings) — Google's edge-optimised multimodal model. 128K context. Best overall choice for mobile.

gemma4-e4b.description: Gemma 4 E4B (4.5B active / 8B total with embeddings) — highest-quality edge model for flagship phones. 128K context, multimodal.

gemma3-4b.description: Gemma 3 4B — official Google QAT Q4_0 quantization. Solid mid-range choice, excellent instruction following. 128K context.

gemma3-1b.description: Gemma 3 1B — official Google QAT Q4_0. Ultra-light nano model, runs on any modern phone. Best for low-latency assistants.

medgemma-4b.description: MedGemma 4B — Gemma 3 fine-tuned by Google for medical text and image comprehension. For health and wellness apps. 128K context.

qwen3-4b.description: Qwen3 4B — Alibaba's best compact model. Reasoning performance rivals 72B-class models. 256K context. Great alternative to Gemma on mid-range devices.

qwen3-1.7b.description: Qwen3 1.7B — strong reasoning for its size, 256K context. Excellent nano alternative for devices where Gemma 3 1B is too limited.

qwen3-0.6b.description: Qwen3 0.6B — the smallest practical chat model (~390 MB). Runs on entry-level phones. Ideal for simple assistants and on-device search.

all-minilm-l6-v2.description: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embedding model, 8-bit — 384-dim vectors. Required for TalaDB RAG. Not a chat model.
